alkylation reagent: reduction and carbamidomethylation with TCEP and iodoacetamide
cleavage agent: digested with trypsin (1:50 ratio of trypsin:protein)
instrument: analyzed on an Ultimate 3000 RSLCnano system coupled to an Orbitrap Eclipse mass spectrometer
ionization type: electrosprayed (2.15 kV, 300 °C) into the mass spectrometer with an EasySpray ion source
labeling: mass spectrometry analysis of the BS3-cross-linked sample
